title: Path Drawing SVG

statement.markdown:
heading: ## Draw a Path
text: Create a simple animation using SVG and JavaScript. The animation should draw a path from the top left to the bottom right of a 400x400 square.

constraints: The animation should last for 3 seconds.
The path should be drawn from the top left to the bottom right of the square.
Use a max of 50 SVG paths to draw the animation.

starterCode.html:
<!-- index.html -->
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Path Drawing SVG</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css">
</head>
<body>
    <svg id="my-svg" width="400" height="400"></svg>
    <script src="script.js"></script>
</body>
</html>

gradingCriteria.description: Path is drawn from top left to bottom right
Animation uses a max of 50 SVG paths
